detaileddescription.para: Pointer to the AccelByte OSS instance that instantiated this online user interface.
Map of AccelByte IDs to AccelByte accounts
Map of external IDs (external platform user IDs or display names) to AccelByte IDs
Starts an async task that create the profiles for the requesting user. Will trigger OnCreateUserProfileComplete Online Delegate when Complete

parameterdescription.para: the user id requesting the create

detaileddescription.para: Delegate used when the userProfile create request has completed

parameterdescription.para: the controller number of the associated user that made the request
true if the async action completed without error, false if there was an error

memberdef.argsstring: (MAX_LOCAL_PLAYERS, OnQueryUserProfileComplete, bool, const TArray< FUniqueNetIdRef > &, const FOnlineError &)
memberdef.name: DEFINE_ONLINE_PLAYER_DELEGATE_THREE_PARAM

detaileddescription.para: Delegate used when the userProfile query request has completed

parameterdescription.para: the controller number of the associated user that made the request
true if the async action completed without error, false if there was an error
list of user ids that were queried

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 LocalUserNum, const TArray< TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetId > > &UserIds)
memberdef.name: QueryUserProfile

detaileddescription.para: Starts an async task that queries/reads the profiles for a list of users

parameterdescription.para: list of users to read info about

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 LocalUserNum, const TArray< TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetId > > &UserIds) override
memberdef.name: QueryUserInfo

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 LocalUserNum, TArray< TSharedRef< class FOnlineUser > > &OutUsers) override
memberdef.name: GetAllUserInfo

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &UserId, const FString &DisplayNameOrEmail, const FOnQueryUserMappingComplete &Delegate=FOnQueryUserMappingComplete()) override
memberdef.name: QueryUserIdMapping

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &UserId, const FExternalIdQueryOptions &QueryOptions, const TArray< FString > &ExternalIds, const FOnQueryExternalIdMappingsComplete &Delegate=FOnQueryExternalIdMappingsComplete()) override
memberdef.name: QueryExternalIdMappings

memberdef.argsstring: (const FExternalIdQueryOptions &QueryOptions, const TArray< FString > &ExternalIds, TArray< TSharedPtr< const FUniqueNetId > > &OutIds) override
memberdef.name: GetExternalIdMappings

detaileddescription.para: Get bulk list user by UserId. Only for request by Game Server

parameterdescription.para: Index of user(server) that is attempting to create the stats

memberdef.argsstring: (MAX_LOCAL_PLAYERS, OnListUserByUserIdComplete, bool, const FListUserDataResponse &, const FOnlineError &)
memberdef.name: DEFINE_ONLINE_PLAYER_DELEGATE_THREE_PARAM

detaileddescription.para: Delegate called when a controller-user check user account availability.
Check users's account availability, available only using displayName field.

parameterdescription.para: User's display name value to be checked.

param.type: const TMap< FString, TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetId > > &

detaileddescription.para: Internal method used by FOnlineAsyncTaskAccelByteQueryExternalIdMappings to move external ID to AccelByte ID references back to this interface.

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 LocalUserNum, bool bWasSuccessful, const TArray< FUniqueNetIdRef > &UserIds, const FOnlineError &ErrorStr)
memberdef.name: PostLoginBulkGetUserProfileCompleted

detaileddescription.para: Convenience method to get an instance of this interface from the subsystem associated with the world passed in.

parameterdescription.para: World instance that we wish to get the interface from
Instance of the interface that we got from the subsystem, or nullptr if not found

simplesect.para: boolean that is true if we could get an instance of the interface, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Convenience method to get an instance of this interface from the subsystem passed in.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem instance that we wish to get this interface from
Instance of the interface that we got from the subsystem, or nullptr if not found

simplesect.para: boolean that is true if we could get an instance of the interface, false otherwise
